description: Install dependencies and verify the existing project builds successfully before making changes.
steps: Run `npm install` in /projects/sandbox/mind-map to install all existing dependencies
Run `npm run build` to confirm the project compiles without errors
acceptance_criteria: `npm run build` produces a dist/ folder without compilation errors
verification: Run `npm run build` in /projects/sandbox/mind-map and confirm exit code 0
findings: npm install completed with 182 packages, 0 vulnerabilities. npm run build succeeded in 2.09s producing dist/ folder. Node.js v22, Vite 6.4.2.
